question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.

assessment.note: He names late direction changes and feeling like he missed something, which signals mild strain and some disengaging friction; also reveals a likely clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Late direction changes
new_queue.name: When direction changes late, where do you usually get left out or lose the thread?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Expectation drift
new_queue.name: Where have expectations felt the least clear for you so far?

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?

new_queue.label: Proving yourself
new_queue.name: Where do you feel the most pressure to prove yourself right now?

new_queue.label: Support that helps
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would make the biggest difference right now?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
